flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marion Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.5k → $11.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marion Technical College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.6k → $6.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Marion Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Marion Technical College rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (18.7% → 22.8%).
